mapper.insert:
/* updateEntranceCar */
UPDATE ${apiCommon.schema}.OOUBHD SET ENTDATE = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(#{data.entdttm}, '%y%m%d %H%i%s'), '%Y%m%d'), ENTTIME = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(#{data.entdttm}, '%y%m%d %H%i%s'), '%H%i%s'), LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{apiCommon.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE OUTBOKY = #{data.outboky} AND VEHICKY = #{data.vehicky}
mapper.update:
/* updateOutboundStart */
UPDATE ${apiCommon.schema}.WTAKIT SET TASKSTS = 'OPERSTR', MVSTDAT = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), MVSTTIM = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{apiCommon.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE TASKOKY = #{data.taskoky} AND OUTBOKY = #{data.outboky}
mapper.select: /* getApiShpdckyAndIt */ SELECT WSH.SHPDCKY, WSH.SHPDCIT, WSH.UPDTCHK FROM ${apiCommon.schema}.WTAKIT WT INNER JOIN ${apiCommon.schema}.WSHPIT WSH ON WSH.SHPDCKY = WT.SHPDCKY AND WSH.SHPDCIT = WT.SHPDCIT WHERE WT.TASKOKY = #{param.taskoky} AND WT.OUTBOKY = #{param.outboky}

/* selectOoubitListForApiValidation */ SELECT OUTBOKY, OUTBOIT, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE , WAREKEY, POSHPDT, POSHPTM, POSHPDY , OWNERKY, OWNRNAM, CUSTCOD, CUSTNAM , FNCUSKY, REGIORG, DESTORG, REGIMOD , DESTMOD, DEMODNM, DEMODYN, DEMDMAN , DEMDADR, DEMPOCD, DEMDTLN, OBOMEMO , OUBRQDT, OUBRQTM, SKUGRKY, SKUMKEY , SKUDESC, SKUWEIG, SKUWIDT, SKULENG , SKUTHIC, GROSSWG, GROSSWD, GROSSLN , GROSSTH, FRAREKY, FRLOCKY, FRLAYER , SHLOCKY, RGITQTY, SHCFQTY, SUOMKEY , SHPPLKY, SHPPLIT, VHPLNKY, VHPLNIT , OBOITST, ITEMCOD, PURCNUM, ORDERLN , STLOTNB, SHPLIMT, DELVDSR, BTRFSTC , PARSNCD, PARSNNM, CREDATE, CRETIME , CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER , UPDTCHK FROM ${apiCommon.schema}.OOUBIT WHERE
OUTBOKY = #{param.outboky} AND OBOITST != 'CANCEL' GROUP BY OUTBOKY, OUTBOIT, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE , WAREKEY, POSHPDT, POSHPTM, POSHPDY , OWNERKY, OWNRNAM, CUSTCOD, CUSTNAM , FNCUSKY, REGIORG, DESTORG, REGIMOD , DESTMOD, DEMODNM, DEMODYN, DEMDMAN , DEMDADR, DEMPOCD, DEMDTLN, OBOMEMO , OUBRQDT, OUBRQTM, SKUGRKY, SKUMKEY , SKUDESC, SKUWEIG, SKUWIDT, SKULENG , SKUTHIC, GROSSWG, GROSSWD, GROSSLN , GROSSTH, FRAREKY, FRLOCKY, FRLAYER , SHLOCKY, RGITQTY, SHCFQTY, SUOMKEY , SHPPLKY, SHPPLIT, VHPLNKY, VHPLNIT , OBOITST, ITEMCOD, PURCNUM, ORDERLN , STLOTNB, SHPLIMT, DELVDSR, BTRFSTC , PARSNCD, PARSNNM, CREDATE, CRETIME , CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER , UPDTCHK
mapper.update: /* updateApiWshphdStat */ UPDATE ${apiCommon.schema}.WSHPHD SET SHPDCST = #{param.shpdcst}, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{apiCommon.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE SHPDCKY = #{param.shpdcky}
mapper.select: /* getApiOutStockInfo */ SELECT WS.STOCKKY, WS.SKUMKEY, WS.AREAKEY AS FRAREKY, WS.LOCAKEY AS FRLOCKY , WS.LOLAYER AS FRLAYER , WT.TASKOKY, WT.TASKOIT, WT.OUTBOKY, WT.OUTBOIT , WT.SHPDCKY, WT.SHPDCIT FROM ${apiCommon.schema}.WTAKIT WT INNER JOIN ${apiCommon.schema}.WSTKKY WS ON WS.STOCKKY = WT.STOCKKY AND WS.SKUMKEY = WT.SKUMKEY WHERE WT.TASKOKY = #{param.taskoky} AND WT.OUTBOKY = #{param.outboky}
mapper.update:
/* updateOutboundComplete */
UPDATE ${apiCommon.schema}.WTAKIT SET TASKSTS = 'OPERCMP', FRLAYER = #{data.frlayer}, TOLAYER = #{data.tolayer}, MVEDDAT = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), MVEDTIM = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{apiCommon.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE TASKOKY = #{data.taskoky} AND OUTBOKY = #{data.outboky} AND SKUMKEY = #{data.skumkey}

/* updateWplnhdStatForApi */ UPDATE ${common.schema}.WPLNHD SET WPLSTAT = #{param.wplstat}, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{common.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE SHPPLKY = #{param.shpplky} AND WPLSTAT != 'CANCEL'

/* updateWplnitStatForApi */ UPDATE ${common.schema}.WPLNIT SET WPLITST = #{param.wplitst}, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{common.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE SHPPLKY = #{param.shpplky} AND SKUMKEY = #{param.skumkey} AND WPLITST != 'CANCEL'

/* updateObostatCMPForApi */ UPDATE ${common.schema}.OOUBHD OBH SET OBH.OBOSTAT = #{param.obostat}, OBH.LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), OBH.LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), OBH.LMOUSER = #{common.useract}, OBH.UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE OBH.OUTBOKY = #{param.outboky} AND OBH.OBOSTAT != 'CANCEL'

/* updateOboitstCMPForApi */ UPDATE ${common.schema}.OOUBIT SET OBOITST = #{param.oboitst}, SHCFQTY = 1, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{common.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE OUTBOKY = #{param.outboky} AND SKUMKEY = #{param.skumkey}

/* updateWshpitShpDateForApi */ UPDATE ${common.schema}.WSHPIT SET SPEIDAT = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), SPEITIM = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), SHCFQTY = 1, FRLAYER = #{param.frlayer}, STLAYER = #{param.tolayer}, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{common.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE OUTBOKY = #{param.outboky} AND SKUMKEY = #{param.skumkey}

/* updateShpdcstCMPForApi */ UPDATE ${common.schema}.WSHPHD SET SHPDCST = #{param.shpdcst}, SPEHDAT = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), SPEHTIM = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{common.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE SHPDCKY = #{param.shpdcky} AND SHPDCST != 'CANCEL'

/* updateShpitstCMPForApi */ UPDATE ${common.schema}.WSHPIT SET SHPITST = #{param.shpitst}, FRLAYER = #{param.frlayer}, STLAYER = #{param.tolayer}, SHCFQTY = 1, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{common.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE OUTBOKY = #{param.outboky} AND SKUMKEY = #{param.skumkey} AND SHPITST != 'CANCEL'

/* updateWtakitStatOperCmpForApi */ UPDATE ${common.schema}.WTAKIT SET TASKSTS = 'OPERCMP', MVEDDAT = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), MVEDTIM = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{common.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE TASKOKY = #{param.taskoky} AND SKUMKEY = #{param.skumkey}

/* updateTplnhdStatForApi */ UPDATE ${common.schema}.TPLNHD SET TPNSTAT = #{status}, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{common.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE VHPLNKY IN( SELECT VHPLNKY FROM ${common.schema}.OOUBIT WHERE OUTBOKY = #{param.outboky} GROUP BY VHPLNKY ) AND TPNSTAT = 'PLAN'

/* updateTplnitStatForApi */ UPDATE ${common.schema}.TPLNIT SET TPISTAT = #{status}, BILDATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{common.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE SKUMKEY = #{data.skumkey} AND VHPLNKY = ( SELECT VHPLNKY FROM ${common.schema}.OOUBIT WHERE OUTBOKY = #{data.outboky} AND SKUMKEY = #{data.skumkey} ) AND TPISTAT = 'PLAN'
